cards.back: A time-slicing algorithm that allocates a fixed time slice to each process, and then switches to the next process in the ready queue
A scheduling algorithm that allows a process with high priority to inherit the priority of a process with lower priority
A technique used to find the shortest path between nodes in a communication network, used to optimize the scheduling of processes on multiple processors
A scheduling algorithm that assigns the next available time slice to the process with the earliest deadline
A scheduling algorithm that uses multiple queues with different time slice allocations, based on the priority of the processes
